D3DPERF_StopPerfProfile

Stops the graphics processing unit (GPU) profiler.

void WINAPI D3DPERF_StopPerfProfile();

Parameters

None.

Return Values

None.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in d3d8perf.h.
  Import Library: Use d3d8i.lib or d3d8d.lib.
